phase.name: standalone-ready
phase.goal: Stabilize repub-builder as a standalone GitHub-tag-installable package. Green CI, tagged release story, consumer-install verification against the magicborn book projects (magicborn-rune-path, mordreds-tale, mordreds-legacy). Retire the vendored copy inside custom_portfolio.

deliverables.item: GitHub Actions workflow — pnpm install, pnpm build, pnpm test on push + PR
Tagged release (v0.1.0 or higher) documented in README
Consumer verify: magicborn book projects install from `git+https://github.com/MagicbornStudios/repub-builder.git#v0.1.0` and build a .repub without workspace:* hacks
CONTRIBUTING.md with the GAD loop and CI expectations
Cross-ref back to custom_portfolio tracked in DECISIONS.xml
